title: aira capillaris var. cupaniana
intro: Aira capillaris var. cupaniana, also known as Italian Hair Grass or Cupan's Hair Grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aira capillaris var. cupaniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune system function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, although I couldn't find information on specific herbal preparations.
